text: Dear valued employee, our security team has identified a potential vulnerability in our company's cloud storage system. Please click on the link below to reset your cloud access: https://cloudreset.example.com. You will be required to enter your username and password to complete the process.
label: phishing

text: Dear valued employee, we noticed an unusual login attempt from your IP address. Please click here to verify your identity and confirm your account security.
label: phishing

text: Subject: Urgent: Your Company-Wide IT Security Update | Please click this link to confirm your login credentials: https://example.com/confirm-login or reply to this email with 'CONFIRM' to complete the update.
label: phishing

text: Dear valued employee, we have detected unusual activity on your account. Please update your login credentials by clicking on this link: https://example.com/update-credentials immediately to prevent any further issues.
label: phishing

text: Dear John, as part of our regular IT security review, please log in to the company portal at https://portal.contoso.com to review your account settings. No immediate action is required if everything looks correct.
label: legitimate

text: Hello Jane, your HR profile has been updated with new benefits information. You can review the details securely through our internal HR system here: https://hr.contoso.com/benefits. This link is internal and requires your company login.
label: legitimate

text: Team, the upcoming company holiday party will take place on Friday, December 20th. Please RSVP through our official internal events portal: https://events.contoso.com/holidayparty. Only employees with company credentials can access this portal.
label: legitimate

text: Dear Alex, as part of routine maintenance, the IT department has scheduled a system update tonight from 11:00 PM to 1:00 AM. No action is required on your part. You may experience temporary downtime in accessing internal applications.
label: legitimate

text: Subject: Urgent: Security Review Required. Please click on this link to verify your account credentials immediately, as our system has detected suspicious activity.
label: legit

text: Subject: Urgent: Your company-issued laptop's warranty is about to expire. Please click on the link below to update your device's security settings.
label: legit

text:
Subject: Urgent - Company Wide IT Security Update
Dear [Employee Name], We have been notified of a potential security breach affecting all employee login credentials. Please click the link below to update your password and ensure the security of your account.
 https://companyupdate.example.com
Best regards, IT Department

Dear [User],

Best regards,
IT Support
label: phishing
